2026-07-12 22:40:56.510 -05:00 [DBG] Executing DbCommand [Parameters=[@__p_0='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT p0."Id", p0."CategoriaId", p0."CodigoBarra", p0."Color", p0."Descripcion", p0."ImagenUrl", p0."Nombre", p0."Precio", p0."Stock", p0."Talla", c."Id", c."Descripcion", c."Nombre"
FROM (
    SELECT p."Id", p."CategoriaId", p."CodigoBarra", p."Color", p."Descripcion", p."ImagenUrl", p."Nombre", p."Precio", p."Stock", p."Talla"
    FROM "Prendas" AS p
    WHERE p."Stock" > 0 AND p."Stock" <= 5
    ORDER BY p."Stock"
    LIMIT @__p_0
) AS p0
INNER JOIN "Categorias" AS c ON p0."CategoriaId" = c."Id"
